< Home >

Itslearning.RestApi.Entities.PersonContextRole

Represents detailed roles in a course to which a course profile in itslearning is mapped. User's context specific role

Possible enumeration values:

NameValueDescription
Member

1

The member role. It is a default role.
Learner

2

The learner role.
Instructor

3

The instructor role.
ContentDeveloper

4

The content developer role.
Manager

5

The manager role.
Mentor

6

The mentor role.
Administrator

7

The administrator role.
TeachingAssistant

8

The teaching assistant role.
